title: Commercial Appraiser
description: Marsh McLennan is seeking a Commercial Appraiser to value commercial properties and provide risk assessment reports for insurance and lending purposes. Working remotely across our Los Angeles region, you will analyze property characteristics, comparable market data, and financial performance to determine fair market values. Your appraisals support critical business decisions for Fortune 500 companies and institutional investors.
responsibilities: Conduct commercial property inspections and gather data on building systems, condition, and specifications
Analyze comparable properties and market data to support valuation conclusions
Prepare comprehensive appraisal reports following USPAP standards
Research income statements and expense data for income-approach valuations
Interface with clients to clarify property characteristics and intended use
Stay current on real estate market trends and valuation methodologies

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Real Estate, Finance, Business, or related field
certifications: California Certified Commercial Real Estate Appraiser license required

benefits: Health, dental, vision, life insurance, and FSA options
Professional development and continuing education support
Remote work flexibility and commute reimbursement for required travel
